name: Container-only growing
description: No in-ground planting; mobility or contamination avoidance.

name: Elevated background radiation (modeling)
description: Hypothetical stress scenario; not operational guidance without expert review.

name: Home garden (typical)
description: Standard backyard or community plot with reasonable inputs.

description: Sealed or indoor grow with pumps/lights constrained by outages.

name: Urban soil (possible contamination)
description: Assume unknown heavy metals; test and remediate.
